user.title: Helen Energy Consumption
user.description: Sign in with your Oma Helen credentials. Only electricity consumption is imported.

select_site.title: Select delivery site
select_site.description: Your account has more than one delivery site. Choose which one to import; each option shows its metering point ID (GSRN) and address.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Helen
reauth_confirm.description: Your Helen session expired. Enter your password again.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Helen. Try again later.
error.invalid_delivery_site_id: That delivery site could not be selected.

abort.no_delivery_sites: This Helen account has no electricity delivery site to import.

backfill.name: Backfill consumption history
backfill.description: Re-derive hourly electricity consumption from Helen for a delivery site, from a start date through now, rebuilding its statistics chain. Hours Helen has data for are re-derived; hours it does not are preserved from existing data. Data before the start date is left untouched. If Helen later revises a past hour while omitting others in the range, a small correction may be attributed to a neighbouring hour; range totals stay monotonic.

start_date.name: Start date
start_date.description: The first day to rebuild, from 00:00 Europe/Helsinki through now.

config_entry_id.name: Delivery site
config_entry_id.description: Which configured delivery site to rebuild. Required only when more than one delivery site is configured.
